You young ones will never know how much this mans hairstyles shaped a generation.

Every time he got it cut or styled, you could guaran-damn-tee, all the lads would show up to school the next day with the same style.

The same way now you've got all these lads with the Phil Foden/Cole Palmer "bowl" cut style.
